name: business-entity-disputes-kit
title: Nevada Business Entity Disputes & Commercial Litigation — Attorney Marketing Kit
description: Generates Nevada-specific, bar-compliant marketing for business litigation attorneys. Pre-loaded with 7 statutory moats: NRS 78.138(7) near-absolute BJR, NRS 86.286 manager-only fiduciary duties, NRS 86.296 full duty elimination, NRS 78.747 codified alter ego, NRS 112 UVTA 4-year SOL, NRS 78.347 deadlock dissolution standard, Clark County Business Court (Dept. 32).
target_buyer: business litigation attorney, commercial litigation attorney, legal marketing agency
author: max_0x1
